title: Reduced palette — collapse 30 colors to 8 anchor swatches
hypothesis: Wiki principle [color-and-lighting §2.1]: '5 to 8 distinct hues per asset is a reliable working budget.' Eldra currently uses 30 distinct color constants — 4× the wiki budget. This run collapses them to 8 anchors: SKIN, HAIR, FABRIC_LIGHT, FABRIC_DARK, LEATHER, METAL, GLOW, GREEN. All 'shadow' / 'dark' / 'trim' variants alias to their anchor (TUNIC_SEAM → FABRIC_LIGHT, BEARD_WHITE → HAIR, PANT_DK → LEATHER, etc). Tests whether the limited-palette discipline makes the silhouette feel MORE intentional or just flat. If r010 reads cleaner than r001, our 30-color baseline is genuinely muddied; if r010 loses readability, some of those 'redundant' colors were carrying their weight.
